{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Territory Sales Manager",
  "description": "Perfetti Van Melle Nigeria Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Perfetti Van Melle group, one of the worlds largest manufacturers and distributors of confectionery and chewing gum, creating imaginative products and brands that are enjoyed in over 150 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Territory Sales Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

What You Will Do


	The incumbent will be responsible for setting up distribution by designing beat plans for distributors within their territory in consultation with the Regional Sales Manager to ensure optimal market coverage
	The role includes ensuring the availability of distributor infrastructure such as distribution units, warehouse facilities, beat plans, sales personnel, and adequate financing
	The incumbent will manage distributors by tracking their efficiency, addressing issues promptly, and monitoring return on investment
	They will maintain and manage the Management Information System (MIS) to ensure accurate business tracking and provide regular reports to the head office and Regional Sales Manager as agreed
	The role involves achieving assigned sales targets and breaking them down into channels and beats, with responsibility for both primary and secondary sales performance
	The incumbent will oversee team management by reviewing distributor sales team performance and implementing training programs to drive improvement.
	They will also gather and report market intelligence by monitoring competitor activities including promotions, product launches, and activations and communicating insights to the Regional Sales Manager and Head of Sales.


Our Perfect Candidate


	Knowledge and Experience:
	Strong knowledge and understanding of the assigned territory
	Sound business knowledge
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite


Skills:


	Result-oriented with strong time management abilities
	Analytical mindset
	Leadership capability
	Excellent communication skills

Territory Sales Manager Job at Perfetti Van Melle Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Perfetti Van Melle Nigeria Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Perfetti Van Melle group, one of the worlds largest manufacturers and distributors of confectionery and chewing gum, creating imaginative products and brands that are enjoyed in over 150 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Territory Sales Manager

Job Location: Lagos

What You Will Do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The incumbent will be responsible for setting up distribution by designing beat plans for distributors within their territory in consultation with the Regional Sales Manager to ensure optimal market coverage
	The role includes ensuring the availability of distributor infrastructure such as distribution units, warehouse facilities, beat plans, sales personnel, and adequate financing
	The incumbent will manage distributors by tracking their efficiency, addressing issues promptly, and monitoring return on investment
	They will maintain and manage the Management Information System (MIS) to ensure accurate business tracking and provide regular reports to the head office and Regional Sales Manager as agreed
	The role involves achieving assigned sales targets and breaking them down into channels and beats, with responsibility for both primary and secondary sales performance
	The incumbent will oversee team management by reviewing distributor sales team performance and implementing training programs to drive improvement.
	They will also gather and report market intelligence by monitoring competitor activities including promotions, product launches, and activations and communicating insights to the Regional Sales Manager and Head of Sales.


Our Perfect Candidate


	Knowledge and Experience:
	Strong knowledge and understanding of the assigned territory
	Sound business knowledge
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite


Skills:


	Result-oriented with strong time management abilities
	Analytical mindset
	Leadership capability
	Excellent communication skills
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Manager",
  "description": "Global Aluminium Industries is a manufacturer of aluminum building components. The company is engaged in manufacturing and marketing building products including aluminium doors, windows, railings and suspended ceilings.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for an experienced Quality Manager to ensure that our products and services meet all necessary requirements before they reach the consumer.


Responsibilities


	Understand customer needs and requirements to develop effective quality control processes
	Devise and review specifications for products or processes
	Set requirements for raw material or intermediate products for suppliers and monitor their compliance
	Ensure adherence to health and safety guidelines as well as legal obligations
	Supervise inspectors, technicians and other staff and provide guidance and feedback
	Oversee all product development procedures to identify deviations from quality standards
	Inspect final output and compare properties to requirements
	Approve the right products or reject defectives
	Keep accurate documentation and perform statistical analysis
	Solicit feedback from customers to assess whether their requirements are met
	Submit detailed reports to appropriate executives
	Be on the lookout for opportunities for improvement and develop new efficient procedures


Requirements and skills


	Proven experience as quality manager
	Conscientious and responsible
	A keen eye for detail and a results driven approach
	Outstanding communication skills
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills
	Proficient in MS Office
	In depth understanding of quality control procedures and relevant legal standards
	Excellent math abilities and working knowledge of data analysis/statistical methods
	Certification of quality control is a strong advantage (ISO 9000 etc.).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates&nbsp;should send their CV to the human resource personnel:&nbsp;globalaluminiumindustries@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Quality Manager Job at Global Aluminium Industries




        
    

        
        Global Aluminium Industries is a manufacturer of aluminum building components. The company is engaged in manufacturing and marketing building products including aluminium doors, windows, railings and suspended ceilings.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for an experienced Quality Manager to ensure that our products and services meet all necessary requirements before they reach the consumer.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Understand customer needs and requirements to develop effective quality control processes
	Devise and review specifications for products or processes
	Set requirements for raw material or intermediate products for suppliers and monitor their compliance
	Ensure adherence to health and safety guidelines as well as legal obligations
	Supervise inspectors, technicians and other staff and provide guidance and feedback
	Oversee all product development procedures to identify deviations from quality standards
	Inspect final output and compare properties to requirements
	Approve the right products or reject defectives
	Keep accurate documentation and perform statistical analysis
	Solicit feedback from customers to assess whether their requirements are met
	Submit detailed reports to appropriate executives
	Be on the lookout for opportunities for improvement and develop new efficient procedures


Requirements and skills


	Proven experience as quality manager
	Conscientious and responsible
	A keen eye for detail and a results driven approach
	Outstanding communication skills
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills
	Proficient in MS Office
	In depth understanding of quality control procedures and relevant legal standards
	Excellent math abilities and working knowledge of data analysis/statistical methods
	Certification of quality control is a strong advantage (ISO 9000 etc.).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to the human resource personnel: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Officer (Live-",
  "description": "RNP Services is an HR Services company&nbsp;for corporate bodies and individuals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer (Live-in)

Job Location:&nbsp;Kabosa, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Attend to the client
	Answer questions about the company&#39;s products

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branch Manager",
  "description": "Tastee Fried Chicken was founded by Olayinka Pamela Adedayo. It began as an extension of Tastee Pot, an outdoor catering company serving Nigerian and continental food at special events. The catering company still exists as Tastee Fried Chicken&#39;s catering operation. In 1997 Mrs. Adedayo incorporated Tastee Fried Chicken and opened her first location in Surulere, Lagos State. She based her restaurant on the business model of the American fast food chicken restaurant Kentucky Fried Chicken, where she had previously worked as a manager. Since opening its first location, it has grown to 14 restaurants.

Today, Tastee Fried Chicken has 8TTC(Tastee Turbo Caf&eacute;) with others in different locations across Lagos State and still growing. It is a Place for career growth and development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Main Accountabilities


	Monitors budget to control expenses and conducts cost reduction
	Effective supervision of various section schedules and training of sales and production managers
	Reviews all operating reports with outlets unit heads and develop a comprehensive report to management
	To liaise with the other unit Heads of the outlets i.e. Audit and Accounts for the smooth running of the outlet
	To ensure that quality food is produced and served at all times.
	To ensure customer satisfaction and good brand representation
	To ensure personnel and environmental hygiene and safety
	To ensure strict adherence to recipe and that there is no stock out.
	To ensure that the equipment in the outlet are in good condition
	Availability of raw material and quality check on it through liaison with appropriate department.
	Maintaining high standard throughout the outlet in accordance with the vision and goals of the organization.
	Maintenance of good customer relation and a customer database as well as attend to customer complaints.


Education, Experience &amp; Technical Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in the field
	Excellent data analytics skills


Other Required Competencies:


	Time management, prioritizing and the ability to handle a complex environment:
	Excellent managerial and supervisory skills.
	Extensive knowledge of operations and production management.
	Ability to interpret financial data as needed to set production goals.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;careers@tfc.com.ng&nbsp;or&nbsp;qsrjobslagos@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Branch Manager Job at Tastee Fried Chicken




        
    

        
        Tastee Fried Chicken was founded by Olayinka Pamela Adedayo. It began as an extension of Tastee Pot, an outdoor catering company serving Nigerian and continental food at special events. The catering company still exists as Tastee Fried Chicken's catering operation. In 1997 Mrs. Adedayo incorporated Tastee Fried Chicken and opened her first location in Surulere, Lagos State. She based her restaurant on the business model of the American fast food chicken restaurant Kentucky Fried Chicken, where she had previously worked as a manager. Since opening its first location, it has grown to 14 restaurants.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Today, Tastee Fried Chicken has 8TTC(Tastee Turbo Café) with others in different locations across Lagos State and still growing. It is a Place for career growth and development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Main Accountabilities


	Monitors budget to control expenses and conducts cost reduction
	Effective supervision of various section schedules and training of sales and production managers
	Reviews all operating reports with outlets unit heads and develop a comprehensive report to management
	To liaise with the other unit Heads of the outlets i.e. Audit and Accounts for the smooth running of the outlet
	To ensure that quality food is produced and served at all times.
	To ensure customer satisfaction and good brand representation
	To ensure personnel and environmental hygiene and safety
	To ensure strict adherence to recipe and that there is no stock out.
	To ensure that the equipment in the outlet are in good condition
	Availability of raw material and quality check on it through liaison with appropriate department.
	Maintaining high standard throughout the outlet in accordance with the vision and goals of the organization.
	Maintenance of good customer relation and a customer database as well as attend to customer complaints.


Education, Experience & Technical Skills


	Bachelor’s degree
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in the field
	Excellent data analytics skills


Other Required Competencies:


	Time management, prioritizing and the ability to handle a complex environment:
	Excellent managerial and supervisory skills.
	Extensive knowledge of operations and production management.
	Ability to interpret financial data as needed to set production goals.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Officer",
  "description": "Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial service to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016.&nbsp;Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited&rsquo;s financial inclusion effort focuses on promoting savings culture, access to credit facilities for income-generation purposes and reducing vulnerability to risk through micro insurance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Sango (Arepo), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Approve loan applications within specified approval limits and refer applications outside approved limits to management for further approval.
	Meet with loan applicants to obtain required information and respond to inquiries regarding the loan application process.
	Analyze applicants&rsquo; financial status, credit history, and collateral/property valuations to determine loan feasibility.
	Explain available loan products, credit options, and applicable terms and conditions to customers.
	Obtain, verify, and compile loan applicants&rsquo; credit histories, corporate financial statements, and other relevant financial documentation.
	Review, update, and maintain accurate credit and loan files in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure compliance with credit policies, risk management guidelines, and regulatory standards.
	Provide periodic reports on loan portfolio performance as required.


Qualificatiobs


	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification with 1-3 experience.


Why Work with Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited?


	If you desire to work in an organization where employee motivation is key and passion is rewarded, then Bosak MFB might be the place for you.
	We are committed to building an open and rewarding work environment where all employees have equal opportunities for growth to realize their full potential.
	Our remuneration and employee welfare packages are among the best in the industry.


Remuneration
We offer the following Benefits:


	Salary: N100,000 &ndash; N140,000 / Month.
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave &amp; Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@bosakmfb.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Loan Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Business Officer Job at Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial service to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016. Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited’s financial inclusion effort focuses on promoting savings culture, access to credit facilities for income-generation purposes and reducing vulnerability to risk through micro insurance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Sango (Arepo), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Approve loan applications within specified approval limits and refer applications outside approved limits to management for further approval.
	Meet with loan applicants to obtain required information and respond to inquiries regarding the loan application process.
	Analyze applicants’ financial status, credit history, and collateral/property valuations to determine loan feasibility.
	Explain available loan products, credit options, and applicable terms and conditions to customers.
	Obtain, verify, and compile loan applicants’ credit histories, corporate financial statements, and other relevant financial documentation.
	Review, update, and maintain accurate credit and loan files in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure compliance with credit policies, risk management guidelines, and regulatory standards.
	Provide periodic reports on loan portfolio performance as required.


Qualificatiobs


	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification with 1-3 experience.


Why Work with Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited?


	If you desire to work in an organization where employee motivation is key and passion is rewarded, then Bosak MFB might be the place for you.
	We are committed to building an open and rewarding work environment where all employees have equal opportunities for growth to realize their full potential.
	Our remuneration and employee welfare packages are among the best in the industry.


Remuneration
We offer the following Benefits:


	Salary: N100,000 – N140,000 / Month.
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave & Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Loan Officer” as the subject of the email.
